name: Aaliyah Johnson
about: 3 years in contemporary retail at Everlane and Madewell. Strong customer service foundation and product knowledge. New to Reflex, eager to learn.
interviewTranscript: I've spent three years in contemporary retail—Everlane, Madewell, Splendid. What I learned is that customer connection is everything. I love helping customers find pieces that fit their lifestyle. The skills I've built—reading customers, building relationships, creating an experience. I'm new to Reflex and eager to prove myself.
